chapter_context.summary: Contrasts Wisdom's grand feast and invitation to the simple with Folly's counterfeit feast of stolen waters, showing the starkly different fates of their guests.

outline.text: Wisdom Builds Her House and Invites the Simple
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Wisdom Builds Her House and Invites the Simple (9:1-6), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Proverbs.

outline.text: Reproof of Scorners vs. Instruction of Wise Men; Fear of the LORD
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Reproof of Scorners vs. Instruction of Wise Men; Fear of the LORD (9:7-12), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Proverbs.

outline.text: Folly's Counterfeit Invitation and Path to the Dead
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Folly's Counterfeit Invitation and Path to the Dead (9:13-18), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Proverbs.

key_themes.title: Wisdom vs. Folly
key_themes.description: Proverbs outlines a practical blueprint for daily living, contrasting the actions, words, and consequences of the wise with those of the foolish.

key_themes.title: The Fear of the Lord
key_themes.description: The foundational principle of wisdom is a reverent awe and trust in God, which guides moral choices and shapes character.

devotional.question: Reflecting on the practical sayings of Chapter 9, what is one specific area of your speech, relationships, or work where you can apply divine wisdom today?
How does this chapter prompt you to choose the path of integrity and diligence over convenience or compromise?

cultural_historical.title: Ancient Near Eastern Wisdom Literature
cultural_historical.text: Proverbs shares structural and thematic similarities with other ancient wisdom writings, but stands unique in placing the Fear of Yahweh as the foundation of all true wisdom.
